name: Nestle Toll House Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Nestle's
Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl. Set aside.
Cream together butter and shortening. Add sugars and vanilla; beat well.
Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Gradually add flour mixture,
stirring in chips and nuts. Drop by teaspoonful onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake for 9-11 minutes at 375°F.
